heroHeadline: Bloomberg and NPR Spotlight Bad Bunny's Cultural and Business Impact as European Tour Leg Approaches
heroSubtitle: Tracking the rise from SoundCloud uploads in Vega Baja to 100 billion Spotify streams, a historic Super Bowl LX halftime performance, and Grammy Album of the Year. Bloomberg reports on bespoke parametric weather insurance behind sold-out Colombia concerts (Apr 20); NPR Throughline explores how Bad Bunny made Puerto Rican independence mainstream; and new Adidas slides for Summer 2026 leaked (Apr 14). European leg begins May 22, 2026 in Barcelona.
footerNote: Data sourced from Rimas Entertainment, Billboard, Spotify Newsroom, RIAA, Latin Recording Academy, Recording Academy, Pollstar, Bloomberg, NPR, and major media
